briefing.headline: Rig up a Ned Rig — finesse post-spawn approach for stained water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Ned Rig is a strong choice for post-spawn with stained water and post frontal conditions.

Wheeler: In stained water, use a chartreuse jig head on the traditional Ned rig for added visual edge with a 3-inch stick bait.

Key adjustment for post frontal: slow down significantly — extended pauses, subtle movements, finesse presentations.

primaryApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: In stained water, use a chartreuse jig head on the traditional Ned rig for added visual edge with a 3-inch stick bait.
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on point, creek channel, ledge. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Texas rig a Ned bait on a swing head jig to fish snaggy areas where an exposed hook empties your terminal box.
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on point, creek channel, ledge. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: Wheeler: Post-spawn offshore on Table Rock, the 3 key elements were brushpiles, isolated cedar trees, and bluff end points/big long main-lake points where schools related to current and hard bottom — mixed species (smallmouth, largemouth, spotted ...
Yamamoto pro Fukae: Rigging a 3-inch Fat Senko Texas-rigged on a drop-shot with a 3-inch leader replicates a Ned Rig presentation but avoids bottom hang-ups around cover

KVD: The Ned Rig is so popular for smallmouth because it imitates gobies. Gobies stay locked on the bottom on rocks — that's exactly where the Ned Rig sits. Find the rocks, you find the big smallmouth. Gobies have changed these fisheries — fish do...

briefing.depthStrategy: Post-frontal post-spawn fish hunker down at 6-12ft near cover. Males may temporarily leave fry. Focus on the deeper side of transition areas — channel edges, deeper points, and offshore structure near spawning flats.
adjustIf: If skies cloud up and wind picks up, re-introduce moving baits — the reprieve from high pressure activates fish
If water clears significantly, downsize presentations and move to natural color patterns
If you get followers without commits, add scent or downsize your hook/weight
